blocks.context: First, install pnpm if you haven't already. Open your terminal and run:

blocks.code:
$ yarn add radix-ui
# or
$ npm install radix-ui

blocks.context: 2. Clone the fork to your local machine and add upstream remote:

blocks.code:
git checkout main
git pull upstream main

7. Make changes, then commit and push to your forked repository:
